description_long: This is a compact, modern cabin with a rectangular footprint and a flat, dark roof. The exterior is clad in vertical wooden planks, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The front facade features large, floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors framed in black, allowing ample natural light to enter. On one short side, there is a single solid door, also framed in black, providing a secondary entrance. The windows and doors are symmetrically arranged, and the cabin sits on a low concrete or stone base. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no decorative elements or porch.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden cabin with a flat roof, large glass sliding doors, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large glass sliding doors framed in black, set within vertical wooden cladding.
description_view_1: This side view displays a single solid black door centered on the wooden facade, with the flat roof visible above.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the cabin's minimalist style.
description_view_3: The opposite short side features two tall, narrow windows, symmetrically placed and framed in black.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with a slight overhang, constructed from dark, likely metal or composite panels
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large, vertically oriented windows: two grouped together on one short side and one large sliding glass door on the long front facade, all symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: One solid exterior door centered on one short side, with a large sliding glass door on the long front facade
